description: A designed White House announcement card built around an official Oval Office photograph. The upper two-thirds is a full-color photo of President Trump seated at the Resolute Desk holding up a signed proclamation toward the camera, flanked by a group of adults and children in athletic gear; behind them are the American flag, military service flags, and presidential decor. The children wear navy and red youth athletic shirts (some with a shield/eagle crest), and the adults include several officials and what appears to be the Secretary of HHS; the visible document reads 'PRESIDENTIAL FITNESS AWARD.' The lower third overlays text on a dark gradient: a small tan/khaki label 'PRESIDENTIAL ACTIONS,' then a bold white serif headline 'President Trump Signs Proclamation Revitalizing Presidental Fitness Test Award, Youth Sports and Fitness' (note 'Presidental' is misspelled on the graphic), with the small white line-art White House emblem and 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark at the bottom. The style is a polished press/announcement card. The messaging promotes the 'Making America Healthy Again' initiative (per the tweet) and the revived Presidential Fitness Test, projecting wholesome family/youth-oriented governance to a general audience.
notable_text: PRESIDENTIAL ACTIONS | President Trump Signs Proclamation Revitalizing Presidental Fitness Test Award, Youth Sports and Fitness | PRESIDENTIAL FITNESS AWARD | The WHITE HOUSE
